title: Async Fetch-to-Commit Orchestration, Results, and Side-Effect Ordering · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A disability-led research network incrementally builds atomic typed ingestion orchestration from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and browser fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, HTTP-client, Express, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, async-cleanup, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of atomic typed ingestion orchestration while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, chan…
objectives: Represent claim, fetch, parse, validate, normalize, commit, publish, fail, cancel, and supersede states as exhaustive discriminated results.
Pass immutable stage outputs and commit only one admitted unit rather than mutating a shared feed object across awaits.
Commit feed, entries, revisions, validators, schedule, lease, and audit evidence together or retain the previous admitted version.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Ingestion State Union
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 8058 during an out-of-order Promise and AbortSignal rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile exhaustive async states, immutable stages, atomic commit, post-commit effects, and counts; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Ingestion State Union.
